an1.235-247:1.1:
1
(235) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my bhikkhunī disciples in seniority is Mahāpajāpatī Gotamī."
an1.235-247:1.2: (236) " … among those with great wisdom is Khemā."
an1.235-247:1.3: (237) " … among those with psychic potency is Uppalavaṇṇā."
an1.235-247:1.4: (238) " … among those who uphold the discipline is Paṭācārā."
an1.235-247:1.5: (239) " … among speakers on the Dhamma is Dhammadinnā."
an1.235-247:1.7: (241) " … among those who arouse energy is Soṇā."
an1.235-247:1.8: (242) " … among those with the divine eye is Sakulā."
an1.235-247:1.9: (243) " … among those who quickly attain direct knowledge is Bhaddā Kuṇḍalakesā."
an1.235-247:1.10: (244) " … among those who recollect past lives is Bhaddā Kāpilānī."
an1.235-247:1.11: (245) " … among those who attain great direct knowledge is Bhaddā Kaccānā."
an1.235-247:1.12: (246) " … among those who wear coarse robes is Kisāgotamī."
an1.235-247:1.13: (247) " … among those resolved through faith is Sigālamātā."
